paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.65, with a change of 8.66% from the prior close and -25.86% over a 21-session window. The price is as of July 21, 2026.

Recent news headlines include announcements of Fermi's second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, set for August 13, 2026, as well as discussions around the company's governance and a recent convertible notes deal. There have been no new news headlines in the last 24 hours.

Fermi Inc. has filed several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and an 8-K announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There has been one new social post in the last 24 hours, mentioning the arrival of Siemens turbines at the Port of Houston.
